title: OneKeyMiner Chainable Visuals
description: A client-side visual extension mod exclusively for OneKeyMiner (Neo) Forge Edition. It fixes the core issue of invisible targets in chain mining/interaction via real-time highlighting of chainable objects.
body:
[![OneKeyMiner(Neo)Forge | Chain Mining (CurseForge)](https://img.shields.io/badge/OneKeyMiner(Neo)Forge-Chain%20Mining-FF6B00?logo=curseforge&labelColor=1E2328)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/onekeyminer-nf)[![OneKeyMiner(Neo)Forge | Chain Mining (Modrinth)](https://img.shields.io/badge/OneKeyMiner(Neo)Forge-Chain%20Mining-1BD96A?logo=modrinth&labelColor=1E2328)](https://modrinth.com/mod/onekeyminer_nf)

# Mod Introduction: OneKeyMiner Chainable Visual

A client-side visual extension tailored for **OneKeyMiner (Neo) Forge Edition**, built to solve the key pain point of "invisible chainable targets" during mining/interaction.  

## Core Features
1. **Chainable Block Highlighting**  
   - Auto-highlights blocks eligible for chain mining (ores, wood) and chain interaction (farmland, furnaces).  
   - Supports two render modes: "Outline" (thick, eye-catching) and "Wireframe" (thin, low clutter), plus optional "see-through walls" for hidden targets (e.g., underground ore).  

2. **Sheep Shearing Highlight**  
   When holding shears and chain mode is active, aiming at one shearable sheep auto-highlights all eligible sheep in range—no more searching flocks manually.  

## Customization & GUI
- Access the config GUI via the default "O" key (adjustable in-game).  
- Tweak settings: toggle highlight types, adjust opacity (0.0–1.0), customize RGBA colors for highlights, and enable/disable custom render pipelines (for compatibility).  

## Compatibility
- Requires **OneKeyMiner (Neo) Forge Edition** (match supported Minecraft versions: 1.19.x–1.20.x).  
- Client-side only: works in single-player/multiplayer (no server install needed).
